name: Carolina Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at Carolina Pickleball Club in Hickory, NC! There are 10 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, food, a pro shop or equipment store, lights, trainers or lessons, water, and locker rooms. The courts are free.

description: Claremont city park is a place to play pickleball in Claremont, NC. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Conover City Park
description: Conover City Park is a place to play pickleball in Conover, NC. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: First United Methodist Church Christian Life Center
description: First United Methodist Church Christian Life Center is a place to play pickleball in Hickory, NC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Hickory Highland Recreation Center
description: Hickory Highland Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Hickory, NC. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Mountain Creek Park
description: Come play pickleball at Mountain Creek Park in Sherrills Ford, NC! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Mountain View Pickleball
description: Mountain View Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Hickory, NC. There is 1 indoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. A membership is required to play. The court can be reserved. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Pebble Creek Sports Club
description: Pebble Creek Sports Club is a public pickleball club in Hickory with 7 lighted pickleball courts. Organized DUPR ladder leagues, open play by levels, clinics, and other events are regularly scheduled. Indoor racquetball courts are used for pickleball drills. Amenities include restrooms, pro shop, or equipment store, water, instructors or lessons, lights, event space, and locker rooms. Drop-in fees or monthly memberships available.
fees: Fee required — $10 drop-in fee for non-members.

name: Rock Barn Country Club & Spa
description: Rock Barn Country Club & Spa is a place to play pickleball in Conover, NC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.
